## StaticTokenAuthorizer class

Simple shared-secret token authorizer.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class StaticTokenAuthorizer
```

## Remarks

Validates either a header such as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`<!-- -->, a query-string parameter such as `?token=<token>`<!-- -->, or both.
